mapper.update: UPDATE admin_user SET last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_user (username, password_hash, real_name, role, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{realName}, #{role}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM admin_user ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_user SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE admin_user SET password_hash = #{passwordHash} WHERE id = #{id}
